name: ponder
description: Self-evolving cognitive framework. 8-step structured reasoning pipeline + MMA knowledge system + automatic evolution. Code-enforced depth loop. Domain-agnostic.

interface.shortDescription: 8-step structured reasoning pipeline with self-evolving memory
interface.longDescription: Ponder is a self-evolving cognitive framework that implements an 8-step structured reasoning pipeline: 神思 (divergent thinking) → 发散 (multi-perspective) → 八卦镜 (blind spot scanning) → 方案 (solution generation) → 收敛 (convergence) → 评分 (scoring) → 推演 (simulation) → 辩论 (debate). It includes MMA (Meridian Memory Architecture) for persistent knowledge, automatic rule evolution, and code-enforced depth loops. Domain-agnostic — works for any problem type.
defaultPrompt: 帮我分析一下这个问题，深度思考
Analyze this problem with structured reasoning
对这个决策做一次全面的推理分析
